name: Vesper

official_profile.subtitle: The Silent Shadow
official_profile.description: Vesper’s scales shimmer like the evening star itself, a beacon that guides her through the darkest nights.

open_questions: Exact subclass, level, stars, stats, troop capacity, power, command, habits, and troop affinities require an in-game screenshot or a richer official gameplay source.
The official public profile validates Vesper as a Rare Sentinel, but does not publish combat mechanics.
